name: AI-Powered Vehicle Insurance Claim Approval Workflow (OpenAI + OCR + PDF API Hub)

parameters.content:
## ✅ Approved Path
Generates & signs an approval letter, stamps APPROVED watermark, uploads to Drive, and emails the claimant.

## ❌ Rejected Path
Generates a rejection letter, stamps REJECTED watermark, uploads to Drive, and emails the claimant.

parameters.message:
=

Your Claim Has Been Approved

Dear {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.claimant_name }},

Your insurance claim {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.claim_id }} has been reviewed and approved for ${{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.approved_amount }}.

{{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.reasoning }}

Funds will be disbursed within 5–7 business days.

Regards,
AutoGuard Insurance Co.
parameters.subject: =✅ Insurance Claim {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.claim_id }} — Approved

parameters.message:
=

Claim Decision Notice

Dear {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.claimant_name }},

Your insurance claim {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.claim_id }} has been reviewed and unfortunately has been denied.

Reason: {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.reasoning }}

You may appeal this decision within 30 days. Please contact our appeals department at 1-800-555-APPEAL.

Regards,
AutoGuard Insurance Co.
parameters.subject: =❌ Insurance Claim {{ $('Parse AI Decision').item.json.claim_id }} — Denied

parameters.message:
=

Claim Requires Manual Review

A claim has been flagged for human review by the automated system.

Claim ID{{ $json.claim_id }}
Claimant{{ $json.claimant_name }}
Email{{ $json.claimant_email }}
Type{{ $json.claim_type }}
AI Reasoning{{ $json.reasoning }}
Risk Flags{{ $json.risk_flags.join(', ') }}

Please review the original claim in the Claims Inbox Google Drive folder and update the tracking sheet.
parameters.subject: =🔍 Manual Review Required — {{ $json.claim_id }}

parameters.message:
=

Duplicate Claim — Already Processed

A claim email that was previously processed was received again and has been skipped automatically.

Email Subject{{ $('New Claim Uploaded').item.json.subject }}
From{{ $('New Claim Uploaded').item.json.from }}
Gmail Message ID{{ $('New Claim Uploaded').item.json.id }}
Original Claim ID{{ $json.claim_id }}
Originally Processed At{{ $json.processed_at }}
Original Decision{{ $json.decision }}

No further processing has occurred. To reprocess, remove the existing row from the claims sheet and resend the email.
parameters.subject: =⚠️ Duplicate Claim Detected — {{ $('New Claim Uploaded').item.json.subject }}

parameters.text:
=You are an experienced insurance claims adjuster AI. Evaluate the following claim data and make a decision.

CLAIM DATA:
{{ JSON.stringify($json, null, 2) }}

EVALUATION RULES:
- APPROVED: Claim is valid, documentation is complete, damage matches the policy type, no fraud indicators
- REJECTED: Claim falls outside policy coverage, insufficient documentation, clear fraud indicators, or exceeds policy limits
- MANUAL_REVIEW: Ambiguous cases, high-value claims (>$50,000), possible but unconfirmed fraud, or missing critical information

RISK FLAGS to check:
- Inconsistent dates (accident date vs report date gap >30 days)
- Vague damage descriptions
- Multiple recent claims from same claimant
- Damage amount seems inflated
- Missing police report for accident claims

Return ONLY a valid JSON object with this exact structure:
{
  "decision": "APPROVED" or "REJECTED" or "MANUAL_REVIEW",
  "reasoning": "2-3 sentence explanation",
  "approved_amount": number or null,
  "risk_flags": ["flag1", "flag2"],
  "claimant_name": "extracted name or Unknown",
  "claimant_email": "extracted email or empty string",
  "claim_type": "collision/comprehensive/liability/property/medical/other",
  "summary": "one-line claim summary"
}

OUTPUT (STRICT): Only the JSON object, nothing else.

parameters.content:
## 📥 Claim Intake
Triggers on new Gmail claim emails, loads workflow config, checks for duplicates, and extracts PDF text.

## 🤖 AI Evaluation & Routing
Routes to Mock or OpenAI evaluator, parses the AI decision, logs the claim to Sheets, then routes to Approved / Rejected / Manual Review.

## 🔍 Manual Review
Claims the AI cannot confidently decide are forwarded to your claims adjuster for human review.
⚠️ **Connect Google Drive credential** and set the correct folder ID for Approved Claims and Rejected Claims upload nodes.

## 🚗 AI-Powered Vehicle Insurance Claim Approval

**How it works:**
1. Monitors Gmail for emails with subject "insurance claim" + PDF attachment
2. Skips duplicates — notifies you if already processed
3. Extracts claim text from the attached PDF (PDF API Hub)
4. Routes to AI: **Mock** (testing) or **OpenAI GPT-4o-mini** (production)
5. Auto-routes the decision:
   - ✅ **Approved** → generates & signs approval letter, stamps APPROVED watermark, uploads to Drive, emails claimant
   - ❌ **Rejected** → generates rejection letter, stamps REJECTED, uploads to Drive, emails claimant
   - 🔍 **Manual Review** → notifies your claims adjuster
6. Every claim is logged to Google Sheets for tracking

**Setup:**
- [ ] Connect credentials: Gmail, Google Drive, Google Sheets, PDF API Hub, OpenAI (production only)
- [ ] Create Google Sheet with required headers — configure it in all sheet nodes
- [ ] Create two Drive folders: **Approved Claims** and **Rejected Claims**
- [ ] Edit **Workflow Config** node: set `self_email`, `claims_adjuster_email`, and `ai_mode`

**Customize:**
- Set `ai_mode` to `openai` for production, `mock` for testing
- Change `mock_decision` to test APPROVED / REJECTED / MANUAL_REVIEW paths without API calls
- Edit HTML in the letter-generation nodes to match your branding

⚠️ **PDF API Hub Key**
Get free key to start from https://pdfapihub.com
